code:
import io
import string

let line = match io.read_line()
when Some(s)
  string.trim(s)
when None
  ""
end

let n = string.len(line)
mut i = 0
mut sum = 0
while i < n
  match string.byte_at(line, i)
  when Some(b)
    if b >= 48 and b <= 57
      sum = sum + (b - 48)
    end
  when None
    sum = sum
  end
  i = i + 1
end

println("digit_sum=#{sum}")
